mapper.select: SELECT id, object_type_id, name, display_name, description, data_type, is_computed, is_required, is_unique, is_searchable, is_sortable, default_value, sort_order, extended_data, created_at, updated_at FROM property_definition WHERE object_type_id = #{objectTypeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT id, object_type_id, name, display_name, description, data_type, is_computed, is_required, is_unique, is_searchable, is_sortable, default_value, sort_order, extended_data, created_at, updated_at FROM property_definition WHERE object_type_id = #{objectTypeId} AND name = #{name}

SELECT id, object_type_id, name, display_name, description, data_type, is_computed, is_required, is_unique, is_searchable, is_sortable, default_value, sort_order, extended_data, created_at, updated_at FROM property_definition WHERE object_type_id = #{objectTypeId} AND name = #{name} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM property_definition WHERE object_type_id = #{objectTypeId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM property_definition WHERE object_type_id = #{objectTypeId} AND name = #{name} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM property_definition WHERE object_type_id = #{objectTypeId}
